audit_conclusion: 25.11 primarily induced union-over-component merge collapse: union Dice improved while component separation and depth consistency degraded.

failure_ranking.evidence: no metric/schema evidence of a threshold-only or evaluation bug; 25.11 selection rows still show high merged rate

loss_term_audit.interpretation: mask/depth terms dominate the objective; final train ratio is 0.973279 and final val ratio is 0.929449

25.10.route_decision: B. run 25.10b failure audit for merged/missed, overlap/touching, slot permutation, and three-component rows

25.10b.route_decision: B. enter 25.11 mask/depth loss rebalance training

25.11.route_decision: B. run 25.11b targeted rebalance or topology-focused failure audit

targeted_rebalance_design.action: start with component-mask-only warmup, then introduce union mask with a capped weight after component Dice improves
targeted_rebalance_design.reason: union Dice improved while merged rate and component Dice did not; union agreement can reward merged blobs

targeted_rebalance_design.action: penalize predicted component-mask overlap for separated/close samples and require slot-specific local masks after Hungarian matching
targeted_rebalance_design.reason: newly merged samples are not confined to touching/overlap, so component separation needs an explicit term

targeted_rebalance_design.action: report and weight touching/overlap separately; apply pairwise center/separation consistency and merge penalty by topology label
targeted_rebalance_design.reason: touching_boundary and partially_overlapping remain high-risk and three-component rows still merge

targeted_rebalance_design.action: stage depth after masks stabilize, normalize per component foreground, and compute overlap/touching depth with conflict-aware masks
targeted_rebalance_design.reason: depth RMSE worsened despite union Dice improvement, matching depth-supervision dilution

targeted_rebalance_design.action: evaluate merge/missed/extra across thresholds, not only selected threshold, before claiming component-count gains
targeted_rebalance_design.reason: existence threshold improves missed/extra but does not explain the persistent high merged rate

threshold_audit.interpretation: 25.11 threshold moved from 0.25 to 0.35, but validation merged_rate remains high across candidate rows; the merge collapse is not just a selected-threshold artifact.
